items.arabic_text: ((إِنَّا لِلَّهِ وَإِنَّا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ، اللَّهُمَّ أْجُرْنِي فِي مُصِيبَتِي، وَأَخْلِفْ لِي خَيْرَاً مِنْهَا)).
items.english_text: (To Allah we belong and unto Him is our return.O Allah, recompense me for my affliction and replace it for me with something better.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Inna lillahi wa-inna ilayhi rajiAAoon, allahumma/- jurnee fee museebatee wakhluf lee khayran minha.)
